positive: I've got a half-formed feeling about where this project should go - something like a studio that runs itself, but I can't put it into words yet. Help me pin down what I actually mean.
You know that quality the best CLIs have, where they sort of teach you as you use them? I want our tool to have... that. Whatever that is. Where do we even start?
negative: Rename the variable count to total_files in tools/report.py and update its two call sites.
